from __future__ import annotations


class OrderProcessor:
    def process(self, order: "Order") -> "OrderResult":
        return OrderResult(order_id=order.id, status="processed")


class Order:
    def __init__(self, id: int, items: list):
        self.id = id
        self.items = items

    def get_processor(self) -> "OrderProcessor":
        return OrderProcessor()


class OrderResult:
    def __init__(self, order_id: int, status: str):
        self.order_id = order_id
        self.status = status


def create_order(data: dict) -> "Order":
    return Order(id=data["id"], items=data["items"])


def process_and_get_result(order: "Order") -> "OrderResult":
    processor = OrderProcessor()
    return processor.process(order)
